[id:16d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73da1f712-7020-3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0060-8ba9-8b77123b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0bbb9fc6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f7321-ca3f-3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b07e8-883e-0a6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f732c0ac3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0c3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b06d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f730e1fbb9fc6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f7321-ca3f-3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b07e8-883e-0a6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f732c0ac3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0c3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b06d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73b6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bb9fc6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f7321-ca3f-3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b07e8-883e-0a6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f732c0ac3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0c3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b06d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f736d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73-7ebb9fc6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f7321-ca3f-3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b07e8-883e-0a6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f732c0ac3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0c3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b06d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f731-3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0bb9fc6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f7321-ca3f-3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b07e8-883e-0a6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f732c0ac3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf- Introduction]

title: # Welcome to the learning path: **Introduction to Inact for Inventory Management**

slide_id: 6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73da1f712-7020-3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0060-8ba9-8b77123b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0bbb9fc6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f7321-ca3f-3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b07e8-883e-0a6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f732c0ac3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0c3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b06d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f730e1
index_title: Hidden Complexities: And something else 
title: **The hidden complexities of inventory management**
layout: standard-6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73da1f712-7020-3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0060-8ba9-8b77123b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0bbb9fc6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f7321-ca3f-3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b07e8-883e-0a6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f732c0ac3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0c3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b06d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f730e1-col
type: main
---
{columns}
{column}
Inventory Is the Lifeblood of Your Business. 
Your inventory is where all business decisions end up.

**Sales** wants more.

**Finance** wants less.

**Supply chain** sits in the middle – balancing
service levels, lead times, and cost.

That balance is hard - but mastering it is key to
running a healthy, profitable business.
{/column}
{column}
![motion slide_id: bb9fc6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f7321-ca3f-3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b07e8-883e-0a6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f732c0ac3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0c3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b06d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73
index_title: Unwanted Complexity
title: **The cost of unwanted complexity**
type: main
---
**When this balancing act fails, the result is costly.** 

Most companies are sitting on 16d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73da1f712-7020-3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0060-8ba9-8b77123b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0bbb9fc6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f7321-ca3f-3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b07e8-883e-0a6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f732c0ac3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0c3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b06d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f730e1fbb9fc6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f7321-ca3f-3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b07e8-883e-0a6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f732c0ac3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0c3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b06d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73b6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bb9fc6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f7321-ca3f-3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b07e8-883e-0a6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f732c0ac3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0c3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b06d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f736d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73-7ebb9fc6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f7321-ca3f-3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b07e8-883e-0a6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f732c0ac3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0c3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b06d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f731-3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0bb9fc6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f7321-ca3f-3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b07e8-883e-0a6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f732c0ac3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0c3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b06d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f739b-a703b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0-3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b06d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73da1f712-7020-3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0060-8ba9-8b77123b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0bbb9fc6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f7321-ca3f-3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b07e8-883e-0a6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f732c0ac3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0c3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b06d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f730e1bb9fc6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f7321-ca3f-3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b07e8-883e-0a6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f732c0ac3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0c3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b06d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73b6c91fdd96d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73–bb9fc6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f7321-ca3f-3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b07e8-883e-0a6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f732c0ac3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0c3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b06d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f736d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73% excess inventory. 
This imbalance silently drains resources in three critical ways:
<br/>

{column}

slide_id: 3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0
index_title: What to do about it?
title: **What to do about this complexity?**
type: main
---
**Well... This is exactly what Inact was built to solve!**

This learning path will be about using Inact for Inventory management – **but that is only the beginning.**

Inact can be a partner across your whole organisation, providing the tools to manage inventory, suppliers, products, and customers effectively.

![image/type: image/size:bb9fc6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f7321-ca3f-3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b07e8-883e-0a6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f732c0ac3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0c3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b06d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f736d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f730px/align:center/frame:none](https://picsum.photos/seed/picsum/6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73da1f712-7020-3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0060-8ba9-8b77123b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0bbb9fc6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f7321-ca3f-3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b07e8-883e-0a6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f732c0ac3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0c3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b06d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f730e100/bb9fc6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f7321-ca3f-3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b07e8-883e-0a6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f732c0ac3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0c3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b06d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f7300)

[id:bb9fc6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f7321-ca3f-3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b07e8-883e-0a6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f732c0ac3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0c3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b06d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73/topic: Outro]
slide_id: 6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73
title: **Here's what's ahead: your learning path**
type: main
---
You will go through five easily-digestible flows. Together, they give you the knowledge, mindset, and tools to succeed with Inact Now for inventory optimization.

![image/size:large/align:center/frame:none](https://picsum.photos/seed/picsum/6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73da1f712-7020-3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0060-8ba9-8b77123b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0bbb9fc6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f7321-ca3f-3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b07e8-883e-0a6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f732c0ac3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0c3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b06d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f730e100/bb9fc6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f7321-ca3f-3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b07e8-883e-0a6d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f732c0ac3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b0c3b401e22-8fe2-487f-86d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f73bf-8a80d0c860b06d9d650b-72a4-4ec4-be8d-b438b8ef6f7300)
